name: Varun Beverages Limited
summary: Varun Beverages Limited is a beverage company that produces and distributes PepsiCo products such as Pepsi, 7 Up, and Mirinda in India and other international markets. The company is involved in manufacturing, bottling, and distribution of a wide range of carbonated soft drinks and non-carbonated beverages. Varun Beverages is headquartered in Gurugram, India.
